name: Mousquetaire Sauce- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks with half of the lemon juice plus the salt, white pepper, and mustard.
2. Gradually add olive oil drop by drop at first, increasing to a drizzle until all oil is incorporated.
3. Add hot water (to keep the sauce emulsified), green onions, and parsley.
4. Fold in the beef stock and season with cayenne.
5. Correct seasoning.
